narrative:
Malaga Township has 627 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.7 percentage points.
